title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Navneet Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Navneet Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
